properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Amazing love That welcomes me The kindness of mercy That bought with blood, wholeheartedly My soul undeserving

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God, You're so good Oh God, You're so good God, You're so good You're so good to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Behold the cross Age to age And hour by hour The dead are raised, the sinner saved The work of Your power

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God, You're so good God, You're so good God, You're so good You're so good to me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh yes you are God, You're so good God, You're so good Oh God, You're so good You're so good to me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: I am blessed, I am called I am healed, I am whole I am saved in Jesus' name Highly favored, anointed Filled with Your power For the glory of Jesus' name :/

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And should this life Bring suffering Lord, I will remember What Calvary has bought for me Both now and forever

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: God, You're so good God, You're so good God, You're so good You're so good to me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh yes he is God, You're so good God, You're so good Oh God, You're so good You're so good to me

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: So many reasons to sing and say

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Say God, You're so good Oh God, You're so good Oh God, You're so good You're so good to, so good to me, I know and I'll sing it yeah

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: God, You're so good Oh God, You're so good yes God, You're so good You're so good to me, so good to me and I'll sing it again

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: I am blessed, I am called I am healed, I am whole I am saved in Jesus' name Highly favored, anointed Filled with Your power For the glory of Jesus' name

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: God, You're so good oh God, You're so good God, You're so good You're so good to me
